goal: Disabled watchdog probes must not leave stale fail states in data/watchdog/state.json or dashboard status surfaces.

acceptance_criteria.description: dc-watchdog records explicitly disabled probes as disabled with a reason, replacing older fail:stale heartbeat states.
watchdogctl exposes paused NAS/Feishu heartbeat probes as disabled, not enabled success and not active failures.

runtime_policy.state_policy: Disabled probes remain visible for operator clarity but cannot count as current failures.
